System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference Central_Panel_Lshape_20200127_20200130T115004.json

Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 714
Receive ID 734
Functional Addr 59
Functional Name MIU
